notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with working alien movement, shields, mystery ship, waves, and lives system, but shield rendering is pixel-by-pixel slow, alien sprites are basic block shapes lacking classic pixel-art fidelity, and the mystery ship spawn logic has a double-condition bug (timer<=0 AND random<0.01) making it rarely appear.
A very solid implementation of Space Invaders with destructible shields, mystery ships, and good alien movement logic, though alien sprites are basic rectangles.

Core loop, enemies, shields, scoring, waves, and game states exist, but held-space auto-refire, awkward pause/title mappings, and some non-faithful presentation/details keep it from feeling fully polished.
